Name: GRAPHICS_PARAM_ST
Description: Determines the parameters used for various graphical settings.

Fields.Name: Decal Generation Position Offset on Bullet Hit
Fields.Description: The offset to apply to the position of a generated decal that occurs upon a bullet hit (by this value in its normal direction).

Fields.Name: Torch: Emissive Strength
Fields.Description: The maximum emissive strength of the torch light. This value is obtained by multiplying the specified frame.

Fields.Name: Torch: Emissive Strength Fade Frame
Fields.Description: The fade time when the torch's emissive strength is changed. 60 frames equals 1 second.

Fields.Name: Decal Fade Distance after Character is Wet
Fields.Description: The distance at which a decal is faded after a character is made wet.

Fields.Name: Multi-Hit Bullet: Particle Interval
Fields.Description: The interval between each hit SFX if a bullet its in multiple stages. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Decal Paint Fade Out Duration
Fields.Description: The fade out duration for decals after they have been painted.

Fields.Name: Grass LOD 0: 0 -> 0
Fields.Description: The grass generator LOD settings from level 0 to 0.

Fields.Name: Grass LOD 0: 0 -> 1
Fields.Description: The grass generator LOD settings from level 0 to 1.

Fields.Name: Grass LOD 0: 1 -> 2
Fields.Description: The grass generator LOD settings from level 1 to 2.

Fields.Name: Grass LOD 0: 2 -> 3
Fields.Description: The grass generator LOD settings from level 2 to 3.

Fields.Name: Grass LOD 1: 0 -> 0
Fields.Description: The grass generator LOD settings from level 0 to 0.

Fields.Name: Grass LOD 1: 0 -> 1
Fields.Description: The grass generator LOD settings from level 0 to 1.

Fields.Name: Grass LOD 1: 1 -> 2
Fields.Description: The grass generator LOD settings from level 1 to 2.

Fields.Name: Grass LOD 1: 2 -> 3
Fields.Description: The grass generator LOD settings from level 2 to 3.

Fields.Name: Grass LOD 2: 0 -> 0
Fields.Description: The grass generator LOD settings from level 0 to 0.

Fields.Name: Grass LOD 2: 0 -> 1
Fields.Description: The grass generator LOD settings from level 0 to 1.

Fields.Name: Grass LOD 2: 1 -> 2
Fields.Description: The grass generator LOD settings from level 1 to 2.

Fields.Name: Grass LOD 2: 2 -> 3
Fields.Description: The grass generator LOD settings from level 2 to 3.

Fields.Name: Sub-window Frame: Width
Fields.Description: The width of the sub-window. In pixels.

Fields.Name: Sub-window Frame: Height
Fields.Description: The height of the sub-window. In pixels.

Fields.Name: Menu Blur: Fade-in Duration
Fields.Description: The fade in duration for the menu background blur. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Menu Blur: Fade-out Duration
Fields.Description: The fade out duration for the menu background blur. In seconds.

Fields.Name: Zoom Blur: Threshold Speed
Fields.Description: The threshold speed at which zoom blur occurs during boost movement. In kilometres per hour.

Fields.Name: Zoom Blur: Interpolation Time
Fields.Description: The time until the zoom blur reaches its maximum value.

Fields.Name: Zoom Blur: Strength
Fields.Description: The strength of the zoom blur.

Fields.Name: Zoom Blur: Centre Offset
Fields.Description: The centre offset to apply to the zoom blur. Used to avoid blurring around the character.

Fields.Name: Zoom Blur: Contrast
Fields.Description: The contrast value to apply to the zoom blur.

Fields.Name: Zoom Blur: UV Value (Top of Screen)
Fields.Description: The UV value to apply during zoom blur at the top of the screen.

Fields.Name: Zoom Blur: UV Value (Bottom of Screen)
Fields.Description: The UV value to apply during zoom blur at the bottom of the screen.

Fields.Name: Hit Particle Generation Limit
Fields.Description: The maximum number of particles that can be generated by hit SFX. In metres.

Fields.Name: Hit Particle Limit Distance
Fields.Description: The maximum distance at which hit SFX will occur. In metres.

Fields.Name: Shadow: Fixed Angle of View
Fields.Description: The fixed angle of view to use for shadow rendering: used to resolve an issue where the shadow sometimes stretches like a line when the player moves repeatedly.
